channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 68.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Andy Burnham faces perilous race to win Makerfield byelection, allies say - The Guardian
item.description: Andy Burnham faces perilous race to win Makerfield byelection, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: Ella Baron on the Labour leadership circus – cartoon - The Guardian
item.description: Ella Baron on the Labour leadership circus – cartoon - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: The theory that Streeting has backed Rejoin to undermine Burnham in the by-election is wrong – he’s long been pro-European and was calling Brexit “a problem” last Oct. www.thetimes.com/uk/politics/...
item.description: The theory that Streeting has backed Rejoin to undermine Burnham in the by-election is wrong – he’s long been pro-European and was calling Brexit “a problem” last Oct. www.thetimes.com/uk/politics/...

item.title: The Guardian: The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers - The Guardian
item.description: The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham faces perilous race to win Makerfield byelection, allies say
item.description: Andy Burnham faces perilous race to win Makerfield byelection, allies say

item.title: FT UK Politics: Labour leadership battle threatens to reopen Brexit wounds
item.description: Labour leadership battle threatens to reopen Brexit wounds

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting accused of restarting ‘Brexit wars’ in Labour leadership row
item.description: Wes Streeting accused of restarting ‘Brexit wars’ in Labour leadership row

item.title: i Politics: Starmer spent weekend at Chequers 'considering his future'
item.description: Starmer spent weekend at Chequers 'considering his future'

item.title: i Politics: Streeting to double down on calls to rejoin EU - despite anger from 'Red Wall' MPs
item.description: Streeting to double down on calls to rejoin EU - despite anger from 'Red Wall' MPs

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham plays down rejoining EU after Streeting advocates Brexit reversal
item.description: Burnham plays down rejoining EU after Streeting advocates Brexit reversal
